title: Thai Corn Fritters
description: Crispy and flavorful fritters filled with corn and spices, perfect as a snack or appetizer.
instructions: 1. In a large bowl, mix together corn, flour, crunchy, and pad thai seasoning.
2. Add salt to taste if desired.
3. Gradually add vegetable oil to the mixture, stirring until it forms a thick batter.
4. Heat about 2-3 inches of vegetable oil in a deep frying pan to 350°F (180°C).
5. Using a spoon, drop small balls of the batter into the hot oil.
6. Fry for 3-4 minutes or until golden brown.
7. Remove fritters from oil and drain on paper towels.
